name: referendum2030
description: Monorepo for the fictitious Referendum 2030 civic demo.

scripts.dev:api: cd apps/api && uv run python manage.py runserver
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter web lint && cd apps/api && uv run ruff check .
scripts.contract:generate: cd apps/api && uv run python manage.py spectacular --format openapi-json --file ../../packages/contracts/openapi.json
scripts.contract:verify: cd apps/api && uv run python manage.py spectacular --format openapi-json --file /tmp/schema-ci.json && python ../../scripts/verify-openapi-contract.py /tmp/schema-ci.json ../../packages/contracts/openapi.json
